quiz.title: Buzzjuice Registration & Orientation Final Assessment
quiz.text: Pass this quiz (at least 70%) to unlock your “Oriented” status, digital certificate, and the Courses Landing Page.

question.title: Profile Completion Requirement
question.questionText: Which step is required before unlocking full platform access?
question.correctMsg: Correct: All required profile fields, including KYC, must be completed (Lesson 1).
question.incorrectMsg: Review Lesson 1: Complete all profile fields before proceeding.

answers.answer: Log in and do nothing else

question.title: KYC Reasoning
question.questionText: Why must your profile info match your official ID?
question.correctMsg: Correct: For KYC, compliance, and eligibility for all courses or affiliate tracks (Lesson 1).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 1 explains why accurate KYC/profile info is critical.

answers.answer: Ensures KYC verification and unlocks full access

question.title: Profile Next Step
question.questionText: If you see a “profile incomplete” warning, what should you do?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Edit your profile and fill in all required fields (Lesson 1).
question.incorrectMsg: Go back to Lesson 1: ensure all profile fields are filled.

answers.answer: Edit profile to complete all required info

question.title: Course Hierarchy
question.questionText: What is the correct order for Buzzjuice courses?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Course → Lesson → Topic → Quiz (Lesson 2).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 2 describes the content structure.

question.title: Locked Lesson Cause
question.questionText: If a lesson or quiz is “locked,” what should you check?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Look for incomplete prerequisite lessons or quizzes (Lesson 2).
question.incorrectMsg: Check for missing prerequisites as in Lesson 2.

question.title: Subscription Access
question.questionText: What does an active subscription enable?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Subscription unlocks content, quizzes, and certificates (Lesson 3).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 3 introduces the role of subscriptions.

answers.answer: Full course content, quizzes, and certificates

question.title: Paused Access Cause
question.questionText: If your subscription payment fails, what happens?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Access is paused until payment is resolved (Lesson 3).
question.incorrectMsg: Subscription lapses cause access pause—see Lesson 3.

question.title: Gating Requirements
question.questionText: What two things are REQUIRED to unlock Health & Safety content?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Active subscription and “Oriented” status are both needed (Lesson 3).
question.incorrectMsg: You must have BOTH gating keys per Lesson 3.

question.title: Support Channel
question.questionText: What is the correct Buzzjuice support email?
question.correctMsg: Correct: support@buzzjuice.net is official (Lesson 4).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 4 lists support contact info.

question.title: Community Engagement Benefit
question.questionText: Why join Buzzjuice forums and groups?
question.correctMsg: Correct: For peer support, Q&A, and collaborative learning (Lesson 4).
question.incorrectMsg: Review Lesson 4 on community participation.

answers.answer: Get help, share resources, learn together

question.title: Conduct Example
question.questionText: Which is NOT appropriate on Buzzjuice?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Cheating or spamming violates conduct guidelines (Lesson 4).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 4: Responsible conduct is required.

question.title: Bylaw Category
question.questionText: Which is NOT a main Buzzjuice bylaw category?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Affiliate Earnings is not a bylaw (Lesson 5).
question.incorrectMsg: See Lesson 5 for the correct bylaw categories.

question.title: Assessment Conduct Violation
question.questionText: What is considered misconduct during any assessment?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Cheating, plagiarism, or sharing answers is misconduct (Lesson 5).
question.incorrectMsg: Revisit Lesson 5 for what is allowed.

question.title: Quiz Attempts Limit
question.questionText: How many attempts can you make at the Orientation Quiz before contacting support?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Three attempts; contact support on failure (Lesson 5).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 5 explains the retake policy.

question.title: Fail 3x Workflow
question.questionText: What should you do if you fail the quiz three times?
question.correctMsg: Contact support for guidance and a manual review (Lesson 5).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 5: Contact support after 3 attempts.

question.title: BUS1300 Availability
question.questionText: When does BUS1300 — Affiliate Management show up on your Courses page?
question.correctMsg: Correct: After passing Orientation (Lesson 6).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 6: Unlock after orientation.

question.title: BUS1300 Earning Unlock
question.questionText: What is required before you can earn affiliate commissions in BUS1300?
question.correctMsg: Correct: KYC verification, activation assessment, and Jewel Affiliate subscription (Lesson 6).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 6: Affiliate onboarding requirements.

answers.answer: KYC, pass activation assessment, Jewel Affiliate subscription

question.title: Affiliate Reward System
question.questionText: What type of commission model does the Buzzjuice affiliate program use?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Multi-tier commission structure (Lesson 6).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 6: Multi-tier commission is key to affiliate earnings.

question.title: Oriented Rewards
question.questionText: What do you receive after passing Orientation and the quiz?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Oriented role, badge, and certificate (Lesson 7).
question.incorrectMsg: Lesson 7: Completion awards.

question.title: Post-Orientation Step
question.questionText: After passing Orientation, what should you do next?
question.correctMsg: Correct: Select and enroll in Health & Safety or BUS1300 Affiliate (Lesson 7).
question.incorrectMsg: Next up: Choose and begin your preferred course.

answers.answer: Select and start your next course path
